CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Sold_To_Account__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_PriceList__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Valid_From_Date__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Valid_Until_Date__c), NOT(APTS_Invalid__c)) ,
IF( AND( NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Ship_To_Account__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Material_Number__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Product_Name__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Contract_Price__c)) , 1,
IF( AND( ISBLANK(APTS_Ship_To_Account__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Material_Number__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Product_Name__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Contract_Price__c)) ,2,
IF( AND( NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Ship_To_Account__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Material_Number__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Product_Name__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Multiplier__c)) ,3,
IF( AND( ISBLANK(APTS_Ship_To_Account__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Material_Number__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Product_Name__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Multiplier__c)) ,4,
IF( AND( NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Ship_To_Account__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Mat_Grp_3_Catgr_CD__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Multiplier__c)) ,5,
IF( AND( NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Ship_To_Account__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Mat_Grp_1_CIT__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Mat_Grp_2_Catlg__c), NOT ISBLANK(APTS_Multiplier__c)) ,6,0
)))))),0)
CustomField.label: NetVsMultiplier Sequence
